rules.name: reviewer_verdict_format
rules.description: Reviewer output MUST contain exactly one of: 'Verdict: PASS' or 'Verdict: REVISE'
rules.validation: output matches /\*\*Verdict:\*\* (PASS|REVISE)/

rules.name: reviewer_summary_counts
rules.description: Reviewer summary MUST include BLOCKING, WARNING, and INFO counts that match actual findings
rules.validation: count(B-NNN findings) == summary.BLOCKING AND count(W-NNN findings) == summary.WARNING
rules.on_failure: IMPL-304: Use parsed counts, not summary

rules.name: reviewer_finding_structure
rules.description: Each finding MUST have: ID (B/W/I-NNN), category (IC-01..IC-08), line reference, issue description, recommendation
rules.validation: each finding has id, category, line, issue, recommendation fields

rules.name: reviewer_category_coverage
rules.description: Reviewer MUST check all applicable categories for the file type (see M1 Section 8 applicability matrix)
rules.validation: categories_checked includes all applicable IC-NN for file type

rules.name: reviewer_severity_mapping
rules.description: Finding severity MUST match the severity mapping defined for each check category in M1
rules.validation: each finding severity matches defined mapping for its category and condition

rules.name: reviewer_file_read
rules.description: Reviewer MUST read the actual file content from disk before reviewing
rules.validation: Reviewer uses Read tool on file_path before producing findings

rules.name: reviewer_read_only
rules.description: Reviewer MUST NOT modify the reviewed file
rules.validation: Reviewer does not use Write/Edit tools on file_path

rules.name: reviewer_cycle_awareness
rules.description: On re-review (cycle > 1), Reviewer SHOULD focus on whether previous BLOCKING findings are resolved
rules.validation: Re-review does not introduce entirely new category findings unless Updater changes introduced new defects

rules.name: updater_blocking_addressed
rules.description: Updater MUST address ALL BLOCKING findings in the update report (fixed, deferred, or disputed)
rules.validation: count(findings addressed) >= count(BLOCKING findings received)

rules.name: updater_warning_triage
rules.description: WARNING findings MUST be triaged as fixed, deferred, or disputed in the update report
rules.validation: each WARNING finding has a disposition in the report

rules.name: updater_test_rerun
rules.description: Updater MUST re-run tests after fixes and report pass/fail
rules.validation: Update report contains 'Tests:' line with pass/fail count

rules.name: updater_report_structure
rules.description: Update report MUST contain: findings table, changes made, test results
rules.validation: Report contains '## Findings Addressed' and '## Changes Made' and '## Test Results' sections

rules.name: updater_dispute_rationale_length
rules.description: Dispute rationale MUST be >= 20 characters
rules.validation: each dispute rationale string length >= 20

rules.name: updater_minimal_fix
rules.description: Updater fixes MUST be minimal and targeted -- no scope creep
rules.validation: Changes limited to lines referenced by findings (prompt-enforced)

rules.name: updater_single_file
rules.description: Updater MUST only modify the file specified in UPDATE_CONTEXT.file_path
rules.validation: Write/Edit tool calls only target file_path (prompt-enforced)

rules.name: loop_per_file_delegation
rules.description: Orchestrator MUST delegate to Reviewer for each file BEFORE Writer proceeds to next
rules.validation: Each FILE_PRODUCED is followed by Reviewer delegation before next Writer delegation
rules.on_failure: Test verifies orchestrator prompt contains per-file loop instructions

rules.name: loop_pass_proceed
rules.description: When Reviewer verdict is PASS, orchestrator MUST proceed to next file
rules.validation: PASS verdict leads to Writer re-delegation, not Updater
rules.on_failure: Test verifies flow logic in orchestrator prompt

rules.name: loop_revise_updater
rules.description: When Reviewer verdict is REVISE, orchestrator MUST delegate to Updater
rules.validation: REVISE verdict leads to Updater delegation with findings
rules.on_failure: Test verifies flow logic in orchestrator prompt

rules.name: loop_re_review_after_update
rules.description: After Updater returns, orchestrator MUST delegate back to Reviewer
rules.validation: Updater completion leads to Reviewer re-delegation with incremented cycle
rules.on_failure: Test verifies flow logic in orchestrator prompt

rules.name: loop_max_iterations
rules.description: After max_cycles (3) with REVISE verdict, orchestrator MUST accept with MAX_ITERATIONS
rules.validation: cycle >= max_cycles AND verdict == REVISE -> accept with warning

rules.name: loop_summary_generation
rules.description: Orchestrator MUST produce per-file-loop-summary.md with metrics when loop completes
rules.validation: per-file-loop-summary.md exists in artifact folder with required metrics

rules.name: loop_file_ordering
rules.description: Files MUST be processed in task plan order with test files reviewed alongside production files
rules.validation: WRITER_CONTEXT instructs task plan ordering; TDD pairing respected
rules.on_failure: IMPL-205: Info-level log if order violated

rules.name: routing_agent_mapping
rules.description: IMPLEMENTATION_ROUTING must map: Writer->05-software-developer.md, Reviewer->05-implementation-reviewer.md, Updater->05-implementation-updater.md
rules.validation: Routing table contains exact agent paths
rules.on_failure: Test verifies routing table content in orchestrator

rules.name: loop_state_creation
rules.description: Orchestrator MUST create implementation_loop_state in active_workflow when debate_mode=true for Phase 06
rules.validation: state.json contains active_workflow.implementation_loop_state after Phase 06 init

rules.name: routing_separate_from_debate
rules.description: IMPLEMENTATION_ROUTING MUST be a separate mechanism from DEBATE_ROUTING
rules.validation: Section 7.6 exists separately from Section 7.5; Phase 06 not in DEBATE_ROUTING table
rules.on_failure: Test verifies DEBATE_ROUTING does not contain 06-implementation

rules.name: no_debate_single_agent
rules.description: When debate_mode=false for Phase 06, orchestrator MUST delegate to software-developer only (no loop)
rules.validation: debate_mode=false -> single delegation, no WRITER_CONTEXT, no implementation_loop_state

rules.name: writer_context_detection
rules.description: Software-developer MUST detect WRITER_CONTEXT in Task prompt and enter Writer mode
rules.validation: Agent prompt contains WRITER MODE DETECTION section with IF/ELSE logic

rules.name: writer_standard_mode_unchanged
rules.description: Without WRITER_CONTEXT, software-developer MUST behave exactly as today
rules.validation: No behavioral changes outside WRITER_CONTEXT conditional section

rules.name: writer_tdd_ordering
rules.description: In Writer mode with TDD, test file MUST be produced before production file
rules.validation: WRITER_CONTEXT section instructs test-first ordering

rules.name: phase16_final_sweep
rules.description: Phase 16 MUST run batch-only checks when implementation_loop_state.status == 'completed'
rules.validation: Agent prompt contains scope detection logic and INCLUDE/EXCLUDE lists

rules.name: phase16_no_per_file_review
rules.description: Phase 16 MUST NOT re-review individual file logic/quality in Final Sweep mode
rules.validation: EXCLUDE list in agent prompt contains individual file checks

rules.name: phase08_human_review_only
rules.description: Phase 08 MUST focus on architecture, business logic, design coherence in Human Review Only mode
rules.validation: Agent prompt contains modified checklist for reduced scope
